problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: The key to What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties? is Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) — specifically Two-dimensional material stacking — which would help 10,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
